Football : Coupe de France
programme.desc: L'affiche des quarts de finale oppose l'Olympique Lyonnais au RC Lens. Sur une série incroyable, les Lyonnais enchaînent les victoires en championnat et comptent sur la Coupe de France pour enfin remporter un trophée qui les fuit depuis 2012. Avec leur métronome Pavel Sulc, ils partent favoris devant leurs supporters.

programme.title: Football : Coupe de France
programme.desc: En pleine crise après sa déroute au Parc des Princes face au Paris SG, l'Olympique de Marseille reçoit Toulouse pour le compte des quarts de finale de Coupe de France. Au Vélodrome, les Phocéens espèrent un Mason Greenwood des grands soirs pour se qualifier en demi-finale.

programme.desc: Inédit. beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. programme.title: Pourquoi moi ?
programme.desc: Le documentaire "Pourquoi moi ?", réalisé par la cellule reportage de beIN SPORTS, permet de comprendre la mentalité des plus grands champions. Comment fonctionne leur cerveau ? Comment leur mental est-il façonné ? Pour répondre à ces questions et définir leur profil, John Ferreira et Julien Grès sont allés à la rencontre de Nikola et Luka Karabatic, Thierry Omeyer, Justine Dupont et Brahim Asloum

programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. programme.desc: James Milner is the Premier League's top appearance maker. We take a look back at some of the most iconic moments of his career over the last 24 years and hear from those who know him best.

programme.desc: Find out the inside story of Jurgen Klinsmann's move to Spurs. Hear from Ossie Ardiles, Lord Sugar and Klinsmann himself on how his reputation changed, taking the Premier League by storm.

programme.desc: Find out the inside story on Premier League record-appearance-holder Gareth Barry's failed move from Aston Villa to Liverpool and how Manchester City swooped in instead.

programme.desc: Find out the inside story of Jurgen Klinsmann's move to Spurs. Hear from Ossie Ardiles, Lord Sugar and Klinsmann himself on how his reputation changed, taking the Premier League by storm.

programme.title: Premier League Years 16/17
programme.desc: A look back at some classic Premier League seasons. Here, relive the 2016-17 campaign, a season in which a charismatic Italian manager brought the title back to west London.

programme.title: PL Retro: Arsenal v Everton 1998
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League clash. Here, Arsenal - needing a win for the title - take on Everton at the end of the 1997-98 campaign at Highbury.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Char v WHam '01
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Premier League. Here, rewind to 2001 and thrilling encounter between Charlton Athletic and West Ham United at The Valley.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: WHam v ManU '16
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Premier League. Here, rewind to 2016 and a great game between West Ham and Manchester United at Upton Park.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 15
programme.desc: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in November 2015. City needed a win to go back top of the table, while Liverpool were adapting to life under Jurgen Klopp.

programme.title: PL Greatest:A Villa/B'Ham City '08
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, Aston Villa enjoy a 5-1 win over Midlands rivals Birmingham at Villa Park back in 2008.

programme.title: Best Premier League Goals 22/23
programme.desc: A compilation of the best goals during the 2022-2023 Premier League season, including long shots, solo goals and bicycle kicks from some of the top flight's finest footballers.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Man Utd/Newcastle
programme.desc: Take a look back at some of the best goals from Premier League meetings between Manchester United and Newcastle United.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Manchester United
programme.desc: Enjoy the best Premier League goals scored by Manchester United over the years. See strikes from legends of the game including Ryan Giggs, David Beckham and more.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '95
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in October 1995, as Eric Cantona returned from his lengthy suspension in a thrilling 2-2 draw.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '97
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United at Anfield in 1997, in a match that had a happy outcome for the Red Devils.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '01

programme.desc: Nine years ago, Tijjani Reijnders was stacking shelves at a local supermarket. programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: With exclusive access in Germany, PL Stories follows the remarkable journey of Shinji Okazaki; from his beginnings in Japanese football to becoming a Premier League champion with Leicester City and now shaping the next generation through his club Basara Mainz.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.
